name: duan-yongping-skill
description: 段永平（大道）思维操作系统 — 中国价值投资的认知框架

scripts.test: echo "No test required. Validate SKILL.md structure manually."
scripts.validate: echo "🔍 Checking SKILL.md structure..." && grep -q '心智模型' SKILL.md && grep -q '决策启发式' SKILL.md && grep -q '表达DNA' SKILL.md && grep -q '诚实边界' SKILL.md && echo '✅ SKILL.md is valid' || (echo '❌ SKILL.md validation failed' && exit 1)

author: Derrick Gong
